items.title: Congress says ‘petty pilfering’ from National Sports Development Fund is discouraging sportspersons
items.summary: Congress MP Jairam Ramesh said ‘funds donated to the NSDF were being used to fund sports complexes in IAS officers’ residences and welfare associations’
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Injured Stirling out of Ireland-New Zealand Test
items.summary: Experienced batter Paul Stirling is ruled out of Ireland's one-off Test against New Zealand at Stormont next week with a calf injury.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
